## Summary

I followed the instruction "Walk towards oven and turn right through doorway. Go down hallway and turn left and wait at bathroom," but I ran out of movement budget before finding and reaching the bathroom. 

The challenge was that the house layout was complex with many interconnected rooms, arched hallways, and multiple doorways. I successfully:
1. ✓ Found the oven in the kitchen
2. ✓ Went through arched doorways from the kitchen
3. ✓ Navigated down the main hallway
4. ✗ Did not locate and reach the bathroom before the 500-step movement budget was exhausted

The bathroom appeared to be down one of the halls with multiple doors, but I didn't have enough steps remaining to explore all the doorways and reach it. A more efficient navigation strategy—perhaps scanning hallways more systematically for bathroom-specific visual cues—would have been helpful.
